title: piper arboreum var. hirtellum
intro: Piper arboreum var. hirtellum, also known as the Indian long pepper or hirtellum, is a variety of long pepper that is native to the Indian subcontinent. It is a type of flowering plant in the Piperaceae family, commonly used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of piper arboreum var. hirtellum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as a natural antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, piper arboreum var. hirtellum is often used in teas, decoctions, and powder forms, and is also used as a spice to add flavor to various dishes.
